The firm abstains from opining when its sources 80 do not support a position; an abstention is not agreement with the 81 observed event. Citations link to verbatim source passages; when a 82 source is revoked, dependent opinions are marked accordingly. Follow-up 83 answers re-retrieve from the Noosphere on each question — the assistant 84 does not answer from memory. 85

file.content:
import type { Metadata } from "next"; import "./currents.css"; export const metadata: Metadata = { title: { default: "Current events — Theseus", template: "%s — Theseus currents" }, description: "Live commentary on unfolding events, sourced strictly from Theseus's published Noosphere.", }; export default function CurrentsLayout({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) { return (
Theseus · live

Current events

Every opinion below is generated by Claude Haiku from the firm's published Noosphere. No editorial voice, no unsourced commentary — the firm abstains when its knowledge base does not support a position.

{children}

Opinions on this page are generated by Claude Haiku 4.5 from the firm's published Noosphere of conclusions and claims. They are not editorial commentary, not legal or financial advice, and not an exhaustive survey of the firm's thinking. The firm abstains from opining when its sources do not support a position; an abstention is not agreement with the observed event. Citations link to verbatim source passages; when a source is revoked, dependent opinions are marked accordingly. Follow-up answers re-retrieve from the Noosphere on each question — the assistant does not answer from memory.

); }

content.text:
The Next build compiles successfully. The TypeScript failure is on `playwright.config.ts` (belongs to prompt 17, explicitly outside scope) — unrelated to this work.

Everything in the SCOPE is already in place and verified:

- **Nav label:** `Current events` (layout.tsx:32 → `CurrentsNavPulse`, pulsing gold dot `#d4a017`, active styling when pathname starts with `/currents`).
- **Homepage teaser copy:** label `Live · current events`, row format `<headline> · <stance> · <confidence%>`, link `See all →` to `/currents`. Fetches top 3 from `/v1/currents?limit=3` with `cache: "no-store"`, returns `null` on any fetch error so the homepage never breaks when the API is down (page.tsx:10-89).
- **Transparency footer:** italic parchment-dim text appended inside `CurrentsLayout` after `{children}` (layout.tsx:64-86) — Claude Haiku 4.5 attribution, disclaimer, abstention note, citation/revocation note, memoryless follow-up note. The shell header already sets expectations before opinions render, matching the "two-location consistency" requirement.
- **Permalink affordance:** `CopyLinkButton` mounted in `DetailClient.tsx:18-20` above `<OpinionCard>`; writes `${origin}/currents/${encodeURIComponent(id)}` with a 1400 ms "permalink copied" flash and a `window.prompt` fallback if the clipboard API throws.
- **Open Graph metadata:** `generateMetadata` in `[id]/page.tsx:13-47` sets `title`, 220-char description, `openGraph` (type=article, siteName=Theseus, url=`/currents/<id>`), `twitter` summary_large_image. Falls back to `{ title: "Current event" }` on fetch failure.
- **Share-link UTM policy:** verified — **none**. No UTM params, no trackers, no Twitter share button. The permalink is the origin-relative `/currents/<id>` URL, nothing appended.

Tests: **5/5 passed** (`CurrentsNavPulse.test.tsx` 3 cases + `CopyLinkButton.test.tsx` 2 cases). Next build compiles cleanly.
